Documentation.short_help: PCA/covariance oriented bounding box of a vtkDataSet as a closed vtkPolyData box.
Documentation.long_help: Collects all points of the input vtkDataSet and builds a tight oriented bounding box using the same covariance / eigenvector method as vtkOBBTree::ComputeOBB (not the globally minimum-volume box). Output is a closed triangle mesh. Field data includes OBB.Center, OBB.HalfLengths, OBB.Axis0..2, OBB.Volume, and OBB.IsAxisAlignedFallback when a world-axis AABB fallback is used. Copy Input Points: when on (default), points are copied to a contiguous buffer (safe for all dataset types); when off, vtkPointSet inputs use their internal vtkPoints without copying.

IntVectorProperty.name: CopyInputPoints
IntVectorProperty.label: Copy Input Points
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When on (default), copy all input points into a contiguous vtkPoints buffer before computing the OBB. When off, vtkPolyData / vtkPointSet use GetPoints() directly (no copy; do not modify point coordinates elsewhere while the filter runs).
